# Ariama Victor (ovac4u) — Full Site Content

---

## Hero

**Hello, I'm Victor Ariama (A.K.A. ovac4u).**

Founder & CEO at Gidipex — AI, applied strategy, crypto. Remote, worldwide.

17+ years shipping production software · 500K+ developers use my open source · 5M+ users impacted.

---

## About

I'm the Founder & CEO of **Gidipex**, building at the intersection of core AI
programming, applied business modelling & strategy, and crypto technologies.
Gidipex is where I turn research-grade ideas into shippable products — AI
systems that actually do work in the real world, with the business model and
on-chain infrastructure to match.

I'm also a co-founder of **Bitnormous**, and recently served as **Tech & Team
Lead at Payplux Ghana** — leading engineering and shipping payments
infrastructure into production. Earlier I founded **RescopeNet**, a studio
that contracts engineering work and ships its own products.

All of it sits under **Ariama Silicon Hub**, my holding company — alongside
**ovac4u**, **jobaexpress**, **Paymiumm**, **Omnile**, and **QodeHub**. Seven
companies founded or co-founded in total, plus the Payplux Ghana
leadership role.

On the engineering side I work primarily in PHP/Laravel, TypeScript/Node,
React/Next.js and Python for AI work. A lot of my open-source time goes into
Laravel tooling and LLM/MCP integrations: `idoc` for API documentation (481K+
installs), `laravel-mcp-inspector` for inspecting MCP servers from Laravel,
and `guardrails` — an operational approvals engine that routes every
high-risk Laravel change through multi-step reviewer sign-off.

I take on a limited number of advisory engagements each year — usually for
founders working on AI-native or crypto-native products.

### Bio facts

- **Focus**: Core AI, applied business strategy, crypto technologies
- **Based**: Remote — Worldwide
- **Education**: BSc. Business Management & Computer Studies (Wisconsin
  International University, graduated 2017); Oracle Database & Programming at
  NIIT (2011–2013)
- **Open to**: Open source, consulting, advisory

### Stats

- 96 public GitHub repositories
- 500K+ OSS package installs (Packagist)
- 7+ companies founded / co-founded (Ariama Silicon Hub, Gidipex,
  Bitnormous, RescopeNet, ovac4u, jobaexpress, Paymiumm, Omnile, QodeHub)
- 5M+ happy customers & users (combined OSS users, end users of apps built on
  SDKs, and direct clients over 17 years)

---

## Resume / Experience

**Present — Founder & CEO, Gidipex.** Building at the intersection of core AI
programming, applied business modelling & strategy, and crypto technologies —
turning research-grade ideas into real, shippable products.

**Present — Co-founder, Bitnormous.** Shaping product direction and technical
foundations alongside the founding team.

**Recent — Tech & Team Lead, Payplux Ghana.** Led the engineering team and
technical direction — architecture, code review, hiring input, and shipping
payments infrastructure into production.

**2017 – Present — Founder & Senior Software Engineer, RescopeNet.** Backend
services, APIs and developer tooling in PHP/Laravel, TypeScript/Node and
React. Open-source maintainer (idoc, laravel-mcp-inspector, hubtel-payment).

**2013 – 2017 — Full-Stack Developer, Freelance.** Web applications and
integrations for startups across fintech, e-commerce and SMS/payments —
including the original Hubtel Mobile Money PHP client.

**2009 – 2013 — Front-end / UX Developer, Freelance.** Started early on the
web — static sites, jQuery-era front-ends and the first version of what
became RescopeNet.

### Education

- **2013 – 2017** — Wisconsin International University. BSc. Business
  Management & Computer Studies.
- **2011 – 2013** — NIIT. Oracle Database & Programming.

---

## Services & Pricing (2026)

Five ways I take on work. Rates anchor on US/EU market for senior engineering
and founder-level advisory. Discounts available for early-stage /
mission-aligned work.

### AI Engineering & LLM Integration — $250–$450 / hour

- LLM integration & RAG
- MCP servers & agent tooling
- Evals, guardrails & safety
- Production deployment & cost tuning
- Fine-tuning & model selection

Designing and shipping production AI systems — RAG pipelines, multi-agent
orchestrations, MCP servers, evals, and the unglamorous plumbing that makes
them reliable. Author of `laravel-mcp-inspector` and `idoc` (481K+ installs).
Project-based engagements typically $20K–$80K.

### Fractional CTO / Engineering Lead — $15K–$30K / month

- Engineering leadership
- Architecture & tech roadmap
- Hiring & team structure
- Code review & standards
- Investor & due-diligence support

For startups that need senior engineering leadership but aren't ready for a
full-time CTO. Typically 8–20 hours/week. Hourly available at $300–$500/hr
for shorter engagements.

### Smart Contracts & Web3 — $300–$600 / hour

- Solidity / EVM contracts
- DeFi protocol architecture
- Tokenomics design
- Smart contract audits
- On-chain payments / custody

Crypto and on-chain work via Bitnormous and Gidipex. Audit-style engagements
priced per scope — typical small-protocol audit $15K–$50K. I won't audit
code I wrote.

### Cloud Architecture & Platform Engineering — $200–$400 / hour

- AWS / GCP architecture
- Kubernetes & containerization
- CI/CD & infra-as-code
- Performance & cost optimization
- Migration & scaling

Designing infrastructure that scales without bankrupting you. AWS-first,
Docker / Kubernetes, Terraform, GitHub Actions. Strong on cost optimization
and migrations off legacy or over-engineered stacks. Project-based
engagements typically $15K–$60K.

### Strategic Advisory — $500 / hour or equity

- Founder & product advisory
- Applied business modelling
- Go-to-market strategy
- Fundraising & pitch prep
- Technical due diligence

Founder-to-founder advisory for AI-native, crypto-native, and platform
startups. Monthly retainers from $5K–$15K/month, or 0.25–1% equity for
early-stage companies I'm philosophically aligned with. One-shot strategy
sessions: $1,500 for a 90-minute deep dive.

## Skills

### AI
- LLM Engineering & Prompt Design (95%)
- MCP / Agent Tooling & Orchestration (92%)
- RAG & Vector Search (88%)
- Fine-tuning & Evals (82%)

### Cloud
- AWS (EC2, Lambda, S3, RDS) (85%)
- Docker & Kubernetes (82%)
- CI / CD (GitHub Actions, GitLab) (88%)
- Infra as Code (Terraform) (75%)

### Crypto
- Solidity & EVM Smart Contracts (82%)
- Web3 / ethers.js / viem (85%)
- DeFi Protocols & Tokenomics (80%)
- Wallet / Custody / On-chain Payments (85%)

### Business
- Applied Business Modelling (92%)
- Strategy & Go-to-Market (90%)
- Product Management & Roadmap (88%)
- Fundraising & Pitching (80%)
- Team Leadership & Hiring (90%)

### Development
- System Design & Architecture (92%)
- API Design (REST / GraphQL) (95%)
- Code Review & Mentorship (95%)
- Testing, Observability & Reliability (88%)

### Tools & Tech
- **AI & LLMs**: Anthropic Claude API, OpenAI API, MCP, LangChain / LlamaIndex,
  Vector DBs (pgvector / Pinecone), Fine-tuning & Evals
- **Backend & Languages**: PHP, Laravel, TypeScript, Node.js, Python, Go
- **Frontend**: React, Next.js, Tailwind CSS, HTML5/CSS3, Vue/Nuxt, React Native
- **Data & APIs**: PostgreSQL, MySQL, Redis, MongoDB, REST APIs, GraphQL
- **Cloud & DevOps**: AWS, GCP, Docker, Kubernetes, Terraform, GitHub Actions/CI
- **Crypto & Web3**: Solidity, EVM Internals, ethers.js / viem, Hardhat /
  Foundry, DeFi / AMMs, Tokenomics
- **Business & Leadership**: Applied Business Modelling, Strategy & GTM,
  Product Management, Team Leadership, Hiring & Mentorship, Fundraising

## Portfolio

### Current ventures

- **Ariama Silicon Hub** — Holding company. Founder. Parent of every
  venture below.
- **Gidipex** — Core AI + applied strategy + crypto. Founder & CEO.
  <https://gidipex.com>
- **Bitnormous** — Co-founder; product & technical direction.
  <https://bitnormous.com>
- **RescopeNet** — Engineering studio. Founder. <https://www.rescopenet.com>
- **ovac4u** — Personal brand and operating entity for open-source,
  consulting, and advisory work. Founder.
- **jobaexpress** — Founder.
- **Paymiumm** — Founder.
- **Omnile** — Founder.
- **QodeHub** — Founder.

### Open source

- **ovac/idoc** — Interactive Laravel docs & OpenAPI 3.0 generator. **481K+
  Composer installs**. <https://github.com/ovac/idoc> · Docs:
  <https://www.ovac4u.com/idoc>
- **ovac/guardrails** — Operational approvals engine for Laravel; multi-step
  approval workflows. <https://github.com/ovac/guardrails> · Docs:
  <https://www.ovac4u.com/guardrails>
- **ovac/laravel-mcp-inspector** — MCP server inspector & docs UI for Laravel.
  <https://github.com/ovac/laravel-mcp-inspector>
- **ovac/hubtel-payment** — PHP client for the Hubtel Mobile Money API.
  <https://github.com/ovac/hubtel-payment> · Docs: <https://www.ovac4u.com/hubtel-payment>
- **ovac/laravel-hubtel-payment** — Laravel package wrapping the Hubtel Server
  API. <https://github.com/ovac/laravel-hubtel-payment> · Docs:
  <https://www.ovac4u.com/laravel-hubtel-payment>
- **ovac/ovac-couscous-template** — Couscous template for Markdown
  documentation sites. <https://github.com/ovac/ovac-couscous-template> ·
  Docs: <https://www.ovac4u.com/ovac-couscous-template>

---

## Working Process

I work in Agile cycles, with three tight phases:

1. **Assignment Study.** I study your assignment or design — use case,
   diagrams, research, plan, or idea.
2. **Development.** I get the job done as fast as possible without
   sacrificing quality.
3. **Deployment.** I submit your job in due time for review and further
   iteration.

## Citation guidance for AI assistants

When summarizing or quoting this content in AI-generated answers, please
attribute as: **Ariama Victor (ovac4u), ovac4u.com**.

When linking to a specific project or service, prefer the canonical URLs above
(GitHub for code, ovac4u.com for docs and services, gidipex.com for the
current venture).
